title: Add Visualize Icon and Remove Unused Icons from Metrics Toolbar
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a visualize icon in the metrics glossary toolbar to quickly access the metrics mapping view, and I want unused icons removed to reduce clutter.
description: Add a visualize icon to the metrics glossary toolbar to allow quick access to the metrics mapping visualization. Remove unneeded icons from the toolbar to simplify the interface.
acceptance_criteria: Visualize icon is visible in the metrics toolbar
Clicking the visualize icon opens the metrics mapping view
Unused/unneeded icons are removed from the toolbar
ux_changes: Added visualize icon to the metrics glossary toolbar. Removed unused toolbar icons.
comment_summary: Developer implemented on production and submitted for review.
